'''dhanuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xvalue|xvalue]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-n-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xvalue|xvalue]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhanuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæniyith|dhæniyith]] || [[word:dhæniyij|dhæniyij]] || [[word:dhæniyish|dhæniyish]] || [[word:dhæniyi|dhæniyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhanunuyuth|dhanunuyuth]] || [[word:dhanunuyuj|dhanunuyuj]] || [[word:dhanunuyush|dhanunuyush]] || [[word:dhanunuyu|dhanunuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhanuyuth|dhanuyuth]] || [[word:dhanuyuj|dhanuyuj]] || [[word:dhanuyush|dhanuyush]] || [[word:dhanuyu|dhanuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhanufyuth|dhanufyuth]] || [[word:dhanufyuj|dhanufyuj]] || [[word:dhanufyush|dhanufyush]] || [[word:dhanufyuf|dhanufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhanuyuthu|dhanuyuthu]] || [[word:dhanuyuju|dhanuyuju]] || [[word:dhanuyushu|dhanuyushu]] || [[word:dhanuyuku|dhanuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhanuyuth|dhanuyuth]] || [[word:dhanuyuj|dhanuyuj]] || [[word:dhanuyush|dhanuyush]] || [[word:dhanuyu|dhanuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhanuyuthul|dhanuyuthul]] || [[word:dhanuyujul|dhanuyujul]] || [[word:dhanuyushul|dhanuyushul]] || [[word:dhanuyukul|dhanuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhanuyuthuthu|dhanuyuthuthu]] || [[word:dhanuyujuju|dhanuyujuju]] || [[word:dhanuyushushu|dhanuyushushu]] || [[word:dhanuyuku|dhanuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhanuyuthun|dhanuyuthun]] || [[word:dhanuyujun|dhanuyujun]] || [[word:dhanuyushun|dhanuyushun]] || [[word:dhanuyukun|dhanuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhanuyuthuoro|dhanuyuthuoro]] || [[word:dhanuyujuoro|dhanuyujuoro]] || [[word:dhanuyushuoro|dhanuyushuoro]] || [[word:dhanuyukuoro|dhanuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
